title: World Tree Ranch: Elven Legacy
description:
You awaken with no memories in a tranquil elven village devoted to worshipping the World Tree.

All the elves living here are girls, and they have a unique request—they ask for your help in having children...

Embrace a leisurely slow life filled with relaxation, and enjoy your days freely bonding with the charming and distinctive elven girls!

Relaxing Slow-Life Activities• Engage in farming: grow a variety of crops and care for livestock to fully experience ranch life.

• Experience seasonal changes in the village: enjoy gathering items, bug-catching, and fishing, along with special seasonal events.

• Develop and expand the village as you progress, unlocking new features and expanding your home.

Build Relationships• Chat with the elven girls, gift them items, and strengthen your bonds.

• Deepen your connections and unlock marriage possibilities—aim to build your dream harem by marrying every girl!

Dress-Up and Customization• Change the girls' outfits at any time, customizing colors to your preference.

• Explore a wide range of outfits, including everyday wear, uniforms, and fun cosplay costumes.

Extra Content and Mini-Games• Participate in exciting horse races with horses you've personally raised. Train your horse to become a champion in prestigious G1 races!

• Take on diverse challenges to earn trophies, and proudly display your achievements in your trophy room.

Dive into this delightful world of relaxation, romance, and endless possibilities!
description_short: You awaken with no memories in a tranquil elven village devoted to worshipping the World Tree. All the elves living here are girls, and they have a unique request—they ask for your help in having children...
